name: Microwave German Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds red potatoes, cooked and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine potatoes, eggs, onion, and celery; set aside.
2. Place bacon in a microwave-safe bowl; cover with a paper towel and microwave on high for 2 minutes. Stir.
3. Microwave for 3-4 minutes longer or until the bacon is crisp, stirring after each minute. Remove bacon to paper towel to drain; reserve 2 tablespoons drippings.
4. Stir sugar, flour, vinegar, salt, and pepper into drippings until smooth; gradually add milk. Microwave on high for 5-6 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes until thickened.
5. Pour the sauce over the potato mixture; toss. Top with bacon.
6. Serve immediately. Yield: 8 servings.
